feedback.text: Dear reader, I am glad for this opportunity since it always bothered me for games creators to make a single player game intentionally connected to online platforms so later they can discontinue the game to encourage consumers to buy a new one instead of continuing to play their old favourites and as I pointed out the main issue is it is not designed to host multiple people you play it online but alone in your home so online only mode is unnecessary it could be optional but not forced on consumers. There is no point to make such a game online only they can say they want to be able to patch it later but maybe they could sell a game already finished and good as it is instead of fixing it later so I think that argument doesnt stand its gorund. Thank you for reading!
